title: 2019 Sandhills Manufacturing Canadian Junior Squash Championships
excerpt: The Canadian Junior Squash Championships are live this weekend at the Royal Glenora Club with spillover play at the Edmonton Squash Club. content:
The Canadian Junior Squash Championships are live this weekend at the Royal Glenora Club with spillover play at the Edmonton Squash Club.

The ESC has a number of players from our High Performance program taking part:

  • Isaac El Hayek – Boys U17
  • Amit Joseph – Boys U17
  • Antonella Rodriguez – Girls U15
  • Molli Hay – Girls U15
  • Antonella Rodriguez – Girls U11
  • Mohammed Elserafy – Boys U11 (seeded 2nd)

You can follow the scoring live here: https://clublocker.com/static/tournament_scoreboard/#/tournament=10360&division=0

The draws can be found here: https://clublocker.com/tournaments/10360/draws

Live Streaming for courts 3 &4 at the Royal Glenora: http://sportscanada.tv/2019-canadian-junior-squash-championships

Live Streaming for court 4 at the ESC: https://www.twitch.tv/edmontonsquashclub

As of right now, Romina is 2-0 in the round robin for girls U11, and Mohammed is through comfortably to the quarterfinals with his next game

Keep an eye on our instagram feed for updates from Molli Hay. .
